name: Arpagyongy Kremleves (Cream of Pearl Barley Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bones and vegetables in 1 1/2 quarts water for about 2 hours. Keep skimming the broth to remove scum.
2. Strain the broth, then add enough water to bring the amount back to 1 1/2 quarts.
3. Add pearl barley to the broth and cook until soft.
4. Make a roux by combining butter and flour; cook over low heat, stirring constantly, ensuring it remains light in color.
5. Stir in 1/3 cup cold water and 1/3 cup cold milk into the roux, whisking until smooth. Add this mixture to the soup and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Puree or sieve the soup as desired.
7. Adjust salt to taste.
8. Mix heavy cream with egg yolks and place in a tureen.
9. Just before serving, pour hot, creamy soup over the yolk and cream mixture.
